Common.Controllers.Shortcuts.txtDescript: Add a new row at the bottom of the table.
Apply the style of the heading 1 to the selected text fragment.
Apply the style of the heading 2 to the selected text fragment.
Apply the style of the heading 3 to the selected text fragment.
Create an unordered bulleted list from the selected text fragment, or start a new one.
Use the keyboard arrow to move the selected object by a big step down.
Use the keyboard arrow to move the selected object by a big step to the left.
Use the keyboard arrow to move the selected object by a big step to the right.
Use the keyboard arrow to move the selected object by a big step up.
Make the font of the selected text fragment darker and heavier than normal.
Switch a paragraph between centered and left-aligned.
Choose the next combo box option in the form.
Choose the previous combo box option in the form.
Close the current document window.

Close a menu or modal window. Reset pop-ups and balloons with comments and review changes. Reset drawing and erasing table mode. Reset text drag-n-drop. Reset marker selection mode. Reset format painter mode. Deselect shapes. Reset adding shapes mode. Exit from the header/footer. Exit from filling in forms.
Send the selected text fragment to the computer clipboard memory. The copied text can be later inserted to another place in the same document, into another document, or into some other program.
Copy the formatting from the selected fragment of the currently edited text. The copied formatting can be later applied to another text fragment in the same document.
Insert a copyright symbol within the current document and to the right of the cursor.

Delete the selected text fragment and send it to the computer clipboard memory. The copied text can be later inserted to another place in the same document, into another document, or into some other program.
Decrease the size of the font for the selected text fragment 1 point.
Delete one character to the left of the cursor.
Delete one word/selection/graphical object to the left of the cursor.
Delete one character to the right of the cursor.
Delete one word/selection/graphical object to the right of the cursor.
When the chart title is selected, if the title is empty, move the cursor to the beginning of the line, otherwise select the text.
Repeat the latest undone action.
Select all the document text with tables and images.

When the shape is selected, if it does not contain content, create content and move the cursor to the beginning of the line. If the content is empty, move the cursor to it, otherwise select the entire content.
Reverse the latest performed action.
Insert an em dash within the current document and to the right of the cursor.
Insert an en dash within the current document and to the right of the cursor.
End the current paragraph and start a new one.
Start a new paragraph within a cell.
Add a new placeholder to the equation argument.
Change the alignment level of the operator to the left (for the second line of the equation with a forced break).
Change the alignment level of the operator to the right (for the second line of the equation with a forced break).
Insert the Euro sign at the current cursor position.
Insert the ellipsis sign at the current cursor position.
Increase the size of the font for the selected text fragment 1 point.
Indent a paragraph from the left incrementally.
Add a column break.
Insert an endnote.
Insert an equation at the current cursor position.
Insert a footnote.
Insert a link which can be used to go to a web address.
Add a line break without starting a new paragraph.
Add a line break in the multiline form.
Insert a page break at the current cursor position.
Add the current page number at the current cursor position.
Add the tab character to a paragraph (if the cursor is not at the beginning of a paragraph).
Insert a table break within the table.
Make the font of the selected text fragment italicized and slightly slanted.
Switch a paragraph between justified and left-aligned.
Align a paragraph left.
Hold down the specified key and use the keyboard arrow to move the selected object down by one pixel at a time.
Hold down the specified key and use the keyboard arrow to move the selected object to the left by one pixel at a time.
Hold down the specified key and use the keyboard arrow to move the selected object to the right by one pixel at a time.
Hold down the specified key and use the keyboard arrow to move the selected object up by one pixel at a time.
Increase the indent for the selected paragraphs.
Decrease the indent for the selected paragraphs.
Move focus to the next object after the currently selected one.
Move focus to the previous object before the currently selected one.
Move the cursor one line down.
Put the cursor to the very end of the currently edited document.
Put the cursor to the end of the currently edited line.
Move the cursor one word to the right.
Move the cursor one character to the left.
Move to the lower header (if the cursor is in the header/footer).
Move to the lower header/footer (if the cursor is in the header/footer).
Go to the next cell in a table row.
Move to the next form.
Go to the next page in the currently edited document.
Go to the next row in a table.
Go to the previous cell in a table row.
Move to the previous form.
Go to the previous page in the currently edited document.
Go to the previous row in a table.
Move the cursor one character to the right.
Put the cursor to the very beginning of the currently edited document.
Put the cursor to the beginning of the currently edited line.
Put the cursor to the very beginning of the page which follows the currently edited one.
Put the cursor to the very beginning of the page which precedes the currently edited one.
Move the cursor to the beginning of a word or one word to the left.
Move the cursor one line up.
Move to the upper header (if the cursor is in the header/footer).
Move to the upper header/footer (if the cursor is in the header/footer).
Switch to the next file tab in Desktop Editors or browser tab in Online Editors.
Navigate between controls to give focus to the next control in modal dialogues.
Create a hyphen between characters, which cannot be used to start a new line.
Create a space between characters which cannot be used to start a new line.
Open the Chat panel in the Online Editors and send a message.
Open a data entry field where you can add the text of your comment.
Open the Comments panel to add your own comment or reply to other users' comments.
Open the selected element contextual menu.
Open the standard dialog box that allows selecting an existing file. If you select the file in this dialog box and click Open, the file will be opened in a new tab or window of Desktop Editors.
Open the File panel to save, download, print the current document, view its info, create a new document or open an existing one, access the Document Editor Help Center or advanced settings.
Open the Find and Replace menu (panel) with the replacement field to replace one or more occurrences of the found characters.
Open the Find dialog window to start searching for a character/word/phrase in the currently edited document.
Open the Document Editor Help menu.

Insert the previously copied text fragment from the computer clipboard memory to the current cursor position. The text can be previously copied from the same document, from another document, or from some other program.
Apply the previously copied formatting to the text in the currently edited document.

Insert the previously copied text fragment from the computer clipboard memory to the current cursor position without preserving its original formatting. The text can be previously copied from the same document, from another document, or from some other program.
Switch to the previous file tab in Desktop Editors or browser tab in Online Editors.
Navigate between controls to give focus to the previous control in modal dialogues.
Print the document with one of the available printers or save it as a file.
Insert the registered trademark sign at the current cursor position.
Replace the selected Unicode code with a symbol.
Clear formatting of the selected text fragment.
Switch a paragraph between right-aligned and left-aligned.
Save all the changes to the document currently edited with the Document Editor. The active file will be saved with its current file name, location, and file format.
Open the Download as... panel to save the currently edited document to the hard disk drive of your computer in one of the supported formats.
Scroll the document approximately one visible page down.
Scroll the document approximately one visible page up.
Select one character to the left of the cursor position.
Select a text fragment from the cursor to the beginning of a word.
Move the cursor one line down, selecting all symbols between the previous and current cursor position.
Move the cursor one line up, selecting all symbols between the previous and current cursor position.
Select the page part from the cursor position to the lower part of the screen.
Select the page part from the cursor position to the upper part of the screen.
Select one character to the right of the cursor position.
Select a text fragment from the cursor to the end of a word.
Select a text fragment from the cursor to the beginning of the next page.
Select a text fragment from the cursor to the beginning of the previous page.
Select a text fragment from the cursor to the end of the document.
Select a text fragment from the cursor to the end of the current line.
Select a text fragment from the cursor to the beginning of the document.
Select a text fragment from the cursor to the beginning of the current line.
Show or hide the display of nonprinting characters.
Insert the soft hyphen sign at the current cursor position.
Keep the source formatting of the copied text.
Paste the text without its original formatting.
Paste the copied table as a nested table into the selected cell of the existing table.
Replace the contents of the existing table with the copied data.
Enables/disables the transmission of actions performed in the application for screen readers.
Increase the list/indent level (with the cursor at the beginning of a paragraph).
Decrease the list/indent level (with the cursor at the beginning of a paragraph).
Make the selected text fragment struck out with a line going through the letters.
Make the selected text fragment smaller and place it to the lower part of the text line, e.g. as in chemical formulas.
Make the selected text fragment smaller and place it to the upper part of the text line, e.g. as in fractions.
Insert the trademark sign at the current cursor position.
Make the selected text fragment underlined with a line going below the letters.
Remove a paragraph indent from the left incrementally.
Update fields (e.g., Table of Contents).
Visit a link (with the cursor in the link).
Reset the 'Zoom' parameter of the current document to a default 100%.
Zoom in the currently edited document.
Zoom out the currently edited document.
